rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 6, 2010, line 9. RESPONDENT JOSE ZURITA Motion To Dismiss Defendant's Appeal Of The Oda Issued By The Labor Commissioner Or For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain And For Entry Of Judgment On Roa is continued to May 17, 2010. Defendant must show proof of payment of posting of bond by this date or Court will grant plaintiff's motion. Labor Code section 98.2. =(302/EHG)
